backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a campus placement system with companies, job postings, student profiles, and job applications. Includes access control mixins, CRUD operations for companies and jobs (admin-only), student profile management, and application tracking with status updates.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including runtime error fixes, Internet Identity authentication, routing fixes, React Query configuration, and TypeScript error resolution. Maps features to specific files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components and pages including App.tsx with routing setup, authentication components, dashboard pages, job cards, admin panels, and various hooks for data fetching and mutations using React Query.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, defining CSS variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors with sidebar theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, title 'AI Based Personalized Treatment Recommendation System', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring QueryClient, TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, job details, application flow, admin panel, and profile pages, wrapped in InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon, error message for unauthorized admin page access, and a button to navigate back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/components/admin/Applicatio: Admin interface for viewing job postings and managing student applications with status update functionality (currently shows placeholder for applications).
frontend/src/components/admin/CompanyMan: React component for managing companies with a table view and dialog form to add new companies (name, industry, location). Uses custom hooks for fetching and adding companies with loading states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/JobPosting: React component for creating and managing job postings with a dialog form that includes company selection, job details, skills/branches management with add/remove functionality, and salary range inputs. Uses admin hooks to fetch companies and job postings.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationHisto: Card component displaying job application history with company name, job title, submission date, and color-coded status badges (applied, reviewed, interviewed, offered, rejected) using lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/EligibilityCheck: Displays a card showing student eligibility for a job posting by checking CGPA, branch, and skill requirements with visual indicators for each criterion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a simple footer with copyright information and a disclaimer about placement decisions.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header with logo, authentication status, and conditional navigation links (Dashboard, Profile, Admin) based on user role.
frontend/src/components/HealthForm.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/JobCard.tsx: Displays a job posting card with company info, salary range, eligibility badge, and navigation to detailed job view.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication with login/logout functionality and query cache clearing on logout.
Root layout component that wraps pages with Header, Footer, and a gradient background container.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCompletio: Shows a progress bar and checklist of profile fields (name, email, CGPA, etc.) to indicate profile completion percentage.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationDi: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/StudentProfileCa: Displays student profile information including CGPA, branch, skills, bio, and resume link with an edit button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token from URL params, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminOperations.ts: Provides mutation hooks for admin operations including adding companies, creating job postings, and updating application status. Each mutation invalidates relevant queries and shows toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and auth client creation with configurable options for idle handling and derivation origin.
frontend/src/hooks/useJobApplication.ts: Custom hook for job application mutations that submits applications via the actor, invalidates job and application queries on success, and provides loading/error states with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines query hooks for fetching user roles, companies, job postings, applied jobs, and individual job applications using React Query with the backend actor and appropriate caching/retry strategies.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudentDashboard.t: Aggregates student profile, job postings, and applications data, filtering jobs based on student eligibility (CGPA and branch requirements) and providing combined loading states for the dashboard view.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudentProfile.ts: Provides React hooks for fetching, creating, and updating student profiles using React Query, including a profile completion calculator. Handles mutations with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color palettes (navy, teal, gold) and utility classes including a grid pattern background.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with role-based access control, displaying tabs for managing companies, job postings, and applications. Shows access denied screen for non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/ApplicationFlow.tsx: Multi-step job application page that checks student eligibility (GPA and branch), displays job details, and handles application submission with success confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetails.tsx: Displays detailed job posting information including company details, salary, eligibility requirements, and provides apply button with authentication and profile checks.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileEdit.tsx: Profile editing form allowing students to update their name, email, CGPA, branches, skills, resume link, and bio with dynamic tag management for branches and skills.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: React component for student profile creation form with fields for name, email, CGPA, branches, skills, resume link, and bio. Includes dynamic tag management for branches and skills with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/pages/StudentDashboard.tsx: Main student dashboard component displaying profile card, job opportunities (eligible and all jobs tabs), application history, and search functionality. Handles authentication checks and profile setup flow.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, custom animations (accordion), shadow utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking PlacementPro features, known issues (login page animation, app functionality), and architectural state. Documents student portal features including dashboards, job applications, admin views, and profile management.
